title: T-031 — SCN-020 Receive PO 4-step UI (06-b)
prompt:
# T-031 — SCN-020 Receive PO

PRD: 06-SCANNER-P1-PRD.md §8.2 FR-SC-FE-020/021/025
UX: design/06-SCANNER-P1-UX.md:327-389 §3.7
Prototype: design/Monopilot Design System/scanner/flow-receive.jsx:7-37 (po_list_screen), :40-86 (po_lines_screen), :89-233 (po_item_screen), :236-264 (po_done_screen)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Deliver SCN-020 Receive PO 4-step workflow (list → lines → item → done) wired to T-027 + T-028 with multi-LP per line, GS1-128 auto-fill of lot/expiry, catch-weight branch.

## Implementation contract
1. Routes: /scanner/receive/po, /scanner/receive/po/[id], /scanner/receive/po/[id]/[lineId], /scanner/receive/po/done.
2. Item step: scan product (GS1 → auto-fill lot AI 10 + expiry AI 17), then qty numpad, then location scan; multi-LP add-row support.
3. Done step: green LP card 26px monospace + 'Kolejna pozycja' button.
4. Catch weight branch (FR-SC-FE-025): if product.is_catch_weight, show 'Waga LP / Jednostek' inputs.

## Files
- apps/scanner/src/app/scanner/receive/po/page.tsx [create]
- apps/scanner/src/app/scanner/receive/po/[id]/page.tsx [create]
- apps/scanner/src/app/scanner/receive/po/[id]/[lineId]/page.tsx [create]
- apps/scanner/src/app/scanner/receive/po/done/page.tsx [create]
- apps/scanner/__tests__/scn-020-receive-po.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the 4 steps render, when compared to `design/Monopilot Design System/scanner/flow-receive.jsx:7-37,40-86,89-233,236-264`, then they have the same urgency-dot list, the same progress-circles per line, the same item-step scan + qty + location order, and the same green LP card + 'Kolejna pozycja' on done — RTL snapshot + manual checklist (structural + visual + interaction parity)
2. Given the user scans a GS1-128 with AI 10 batch + AI 17 expiry on the item step, when ScanInput emits, then the lot and expiry inputs are auto-filled and the qty numpad opens focused
3. Given product.is_catch_weight=true, when the item step renders for that line, then a catch_weight_kg field is displayed alongside qty and the submit posts both fields to /receive-po-line

## Test strategy
- RED: write scn-020-receive-po.test.tsx asserting parity + GS1 auto-fill + catch-weight branch before implementation
- Run 'pnpm --filter scanner test scn-020-receive-po'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow over-receipt without server-side error surfacing
- Do not strip GS1 AI parsing failures (must show error banner)
- Do not navigate to done step before /receive-po-line returns 200

pipeline_inputs.description: SCN-020 Receive PO 4-step workflow (list/lines/item/done) with GS1 auto-fill, multi-LP, catch-weight branch.
pipeline_inputs.details:
Parity checklist:
1) PO list shows urgency dots red/amber/blue per ETA.
2) Lines step renders progress circles colored by % complete.
3) Item step order: scan product → auto-fill lot/expiry → qty numpad → location scan.
4) Multi-LP add-row affordance on item step.
5) Done step renders green LP card 26px monospace + 'Kolejna pozycja'.
6) Catch-weight branch shows weight + units inputs when product.is_catch_weight.
out_of_scope: Do not implement TO receive UI here (T-032)
Do not implement putaway UI here (T-033)

Given a GS1-128 scan with AI 10 batch + AI 17 expiry on the item step, when ScanInput emits, then lot and expiry inputs are auto-filled and qty numpad opens focused
Given product.is_catch_weight=true, when the item step renders, then a catch_weight_kg field is displayed alongside qty and submit posts both to /receive-po-line

Do not strip GS1 parse failure error banner
Do not navigate to done before 200
